title: European Heritage Label: 13 new sites celebrated in Brussels
content:
European Heritage Label: 13 new sites celebrated in Brussels

csudaga Thu, 04/23/2026 - 14:25

Recognition of new sites at the ceremony

Marking the culmination of the 2025 selection process, the European Heritage Label (EHL) ceremony took place at the Art and History Museum in Brussels. The heritage community gathered to recognise the 13 newly awarded sites.

The event brought together EHL national coordinators and sites, representatives from European institutions, cultural heritage experts, stakeholders and members of the European Parliament. The ceremony featured performances by participating sites, highlighting the diversity of Europe’s heritage and its role in promoting shared values.

European Commissioner for Intergenerational Fairness, Youth, Culture and Sport, Glenn Micallef opened the ceremony. 
Bogdan Andrzej Zdrojewski, Vice Chair of the Committee on Cul

title: 2026 European Heritage Awards winners announced
content:
2026 European Heritage Awards winners announced

csudaga Mon, 04/20/2026 - 12:06

The annual EU prize for cultural heritage honours 30 excellent achievements and outstanding personalities from 18 European countries representing the latest developments and priorities related to heritage policy and practice in Europe.

Intro Text

The European Commission and Europa Nostra have announced the winners of the 2026 European Heritage Awards/Europa Nostra Awards.

title: Here are the 2026 EU Prize for Contemporary Architecture winners
content:
Here are the 2026 EU Prize for Contemporary Architecture winners

csudaga Tue, 04/14/2026 - 16:06

Winners of the 2026 EU Prize for Contemporary Architecture

On 16 April, the European Commission and the Fundació Mies van der Rohe announced that the winners of the 2026 EU Prize for Contemporary Architecture are

  • in the architecture category: Charleroi Palais des Expositions by AgwA and AJDVIV (Belgium)

  • in the emerging category: Temporary National Theatre by Vidic Grohar Arhitekti (Slovenia)

The 7 members of the international jury announced the winners in Oulou (Finland), 2026 European Capital of Culture, after visiting the finalist works.

title: European Heritage Label: 2027 selection procedure now open
content:
European Heritage Label: 2027 selection procedure now open

csudaga Thu, 04/09/2026 - 15:06

The selection procedure for the 2027 edition of the European Heritage Label (EHL) action is open. Interested organisations should contact the EHL coordinators in their respective countries for the details of the application, as this first stage of the process is done at national level.

Intro Text

Heritage organisations are invited to apply for the call. The initial procedure is carried out at national level.

Card image

title: Dig into Creative Europe’s achievements through stats and data visualisations
content:
Dig into Creative Europe’s achievements through stats and data visualisations

csudaga Wed, 04/08/2026 - 12:46

How many projects has Creative Europe supported in past years? In which cultural and creative sectors were they active? How many grantees has Culture Moves Europe supported in recent years? Where do grantees travel to and from, around Europe and beyond?

Up-to-date, interactive data on Creative Europe

These data and more are now available in interactive overview, providing access to the programme's performance metrics and data to anyone interested. The accompanying page “Creative Europe in numbers” guides you through the dashboard and offers ready-made dynamic charts to get you initiated into the wealth of the programme data.

With this tool the European Commission aims to foster transparency and deepen the understanding about Creative Europe's activities and accomplishments through data
